Browse the catalog

Search actual games, anime, films, software, styles, activities, and behavior rules. Tap an item to open it in review mode.

Add something missing

Add a named game, show, style, technology, habit, person, place, or behavior. Custom items join the random queue and export with everything else.

Full backup

Every item, decision, note, random queue position, custom item, and legacy review record. Use this to resume safely.

Liked, neutral, and disliked items grouped for the next OMNIFRAME personality build.

Readable report

A Markdown summary suitable for manual review or uploading alongside the JSON.

Import backup

Restore a full backup from this version. Existing local data is replaced only after a valid file is read.

Install the GitHub Pages site as a standalone offline-capable app with the OMNIFRAME icon.

Reset local review

Delete the new v2 review state from this browser. Export a backup first.

What changed

Named things instead of abstract combinations

The main queue now contains recognizable games, anime, films, software, visual styles, music genres, activities, specific practices, and plain-language behavior rules. “Collection and archival value” is no longer repeated as an unexplained facet. It appears as concrete choices such as preserving old game builds and patch history.

Like

OMNIFRAME has a positive default attitude and may voluntarily mention, recommend, compare, reference, or become more animated around the item.

Neutral

OMNIFRAME understands the item and can help with it, but does not act like a fan or an opponent. This is the correct choice for things such as League of Legends when you simply do not care either way.

Dislike

OMNIFRAME has a negative default attitude and may criticize or avoid recommending it, while still answering useful questions and respecting direct requests.

Later

No final decision is saved. The item moves to the back of the random queue, and any note already typed remains attached.

Locked source canon

Your uploaded Spotify collection and YouTube subscription research remain automatically approved reference material and are not forced into this manual queue.

Reset the v2 review?

This deletes all v2 decisions, notes, custom items, and queue progress stored by this browser. The older app’s local data is not deleted.
Install OMNIFRAME Review

Open Chrome’s menu and choose Install app or Add to Home screen. The installed app uses the supplied OMNIFRAME icon and the same local review data.
